title: Abd Allah ibn Mu'awiya
body: Abd Allah ibn Mu'awiya ibn Abd Allah al-Hashimi (Arabic: عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنُ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ الْهَاشِمِي, romanized: ʿAbd Allāh ibn Muʿāwiya ibn ʿAbd Allāh al-Hāshimī; died 747 or 748) was an Hashimi leader who started a rebellion against the Umayyad Caliphate at Kufa and later Persia during the Third Fitna.
